name: Chicken Sate with Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken breast halves, boned, skinned, and cut into 1/2-inch wide strips
recipeInstructions:
PEANUT SAUCE
Combine the following in a saucepan:
- 2/3 cup Crunchy peanut butter
- 1 1/2 cups Unsweetened coconut milk
- 1/4 cup Freshly squeezed lemon juice
- 2 tbsp Soy sauce
- 2 tbsp Molasses (or brown sugar)
- 1 tsp Fresh ginger root, grated
- 4 minced garlic cloves
- 1/4 cup Chicken broth
- 1/4 cup Heavy cream
- Cayenne pepper to taste
- Grated lime zest
- Fresh cilantro sprigs
Season the mixture with cayenne pepper. Cook over moderate heat, stirring constantly, until thickened (about 15 minutes). Transfer to a food processor or blender and pulse briefly. Add chicken broth and cream, then blend until smooth. Store in refrigerator if made ahead.
Prepare hot charcoal coals or preheat broiler.
Cook skewered chicken, turning several times and basting with marinade, until crispy on the outside but still moist inside (about 8 minutes). Sprinkle with lime zest and garnish with cilantro leaves. Serve with peanut sauce for dipping.
